heading: Unauthorized wearing prohibited
label: 771 Unauthorized wearing prohibited
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)77110:1393 (1st par., less provisos).(1st par., less provisos), .June 3, 1916, ch. 134, § 12539 Stat. 216The words “Except as otherwise provided by law” are inserted to give effect to exceptions in other revised sections of this title and to provisions of other laws giving such organizations as the Coast and Geodetic Survey and the Public Health Service permission to wear military uniforms under certain conditions.
Amendments2021— substituted “Marine Corps, or Space Force” for “or Marine Corps” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 116–283
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)77110:1393 (1st par., less provisos).(1st par., less provisos), .June 3, 1916, ch. 134, § 12539 Stat. 216The words “Except as otherwise provided by law” are inserted to give effect to exceptions in other revised sections of this title and to provisions of other laws giving such organizations as the Coast and Geodetic Survey and the Public Health Service permission to wear military uniforms under certain conditions.
Amendments2021— substituted “Marine Corps, or Space Force” for “or Marine Corps” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 116–283

children.text: the uniform, or a distinctive part of the uniform, of the Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, or Space Force; or
a uniform any part of which is similar to a distinctive part of the uniform of the Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, or Space Force.
